name: Angel Biscuits (for Freezer)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cold butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in warm water and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, mix together all dry ingredients as listed.
3. Cut the cold butter into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Gradually add the buttermilk to the flour mixture, stirring gently.
5. Refrigerate the dough until ready to use.
6. When ready, lightly flour a surface and roll out the dough.
7. Use a biscuit cutter or small glass to cut the biscuits into desired shapes.
8. Place the biscuits on a greased baking sheet.
9. Let them rise for 10-15 minutes before baking in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 12-15 minutes.
For buttermilk, mix 1 tablespoon vinegar with 1 cup regular milk and let it sit until the mixture is room temperature.
The original recipe calls for shortening, but butter can be used instead.
